name: agent-forge
description: Multi-agent engineering pipeline that runs natively inside Claude Code. /forge triages a request, then a Tech Lead reads the relevant code and decomposes it into sub-tasks (escalating ambiguity to the user when needed), dispatches specialist devs in parallel (frontend/backend/database/devops/daemon/ux/ai), runs 4 QC reviewers (edgecase/security/perf/ux), and runs a real Ralph Loop that fixes findings until clean. All via Task-tool subagents in a single session — no external services, no DB, no dashboard.
